title: Source non-interactive init defaults from stack catalog
description: Update `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/init.py` so `--non-interactive` constructs Python defaults from `STACKS[0]` instead of hardcoded strings, keeping the non-interactive path consistent with the interactive stack catalog.
acceptance_criteria: `init.py` imports the shared stack catalog from onboarding prompts.
Non-interactive init uses Python display name, test command, and build/check command sourced from `STACKS[0]`.
No Python-specific default strings remain duplicated in the non-interactive path.
The change does not alter existing non-interactive control flow beyond default sourcing.
